heading: Today
text: Areas of river valley fog burning off by mid-morning.  Sun, mixed with some high clouds north this morning, and mainly from the Green Mountains east this afternoon.  Not as cool.  Highs in the 60s to low 70s.  Light winds becoming northwest near 10 mph, a few gusts to 20 mph.

heading: Tonight
text: Becoming mostly clear.  Lows in the 40s, ranging from 40 in the cool spots, near near 50 along Lake Champlain.  Northwest winds diminishing to light and variable.

heading: Wednesday
text: Mostly sunny and warmer.  Highs in the 70s, approaching 80 in the warmer valleys west and south.  Winds light and variable.
